original: “Hello there, "+pc.mf("Mr.","Ms.")+" Steele. Always delighted to see you walk through my door.”
“"+pc.mf("Mr.","Ms.")+" Steele! I was just sitting and having a drink. Here for lessons, or perhaps something else?”

“Greetings! Just catching up on some light reading. Fascinating things those siel come up with. There’s more knots in some of these bindings than an ausar orgy.”

He carefully removes the wrapping, saving it in his pocket, and eats the bite-sized snack, taking a few moments to chew on it. After swallowing it the dog boy licks his chops and comments: “These things are damn delicious.”
“So, about that payment?”
“Hold up, I’ll pay in a bit, I just wanna see what transformation I get first..”
You patiently wait for ten minutes, leaning on the wall next to the dog-morph, but you don’t notice anything different about him.
“Are you sure you haven’t changed yet?” you ask, finally overcome with boredom.

“I don’t feel different,” Gil says, shrugging off your question. After a few more minutes he brings his hand to his chin in a pensive manner. “Unless...” He takes off his hood and reveals his moist nose and the rest of his elongated snout, sleek and with short black fur smudged in brown on his neck and jaw, similar to a Doberman. The dog-morph’s mint green eyes are canine, large irises with barely any sclera. Suddenly, he looks straight at you and asks, “What are my ears like right now?”
They are perfectly dog-like and kind of floppy. You tell Gil as much.
“Damn it. I should’ve known. My ears were pointy before I ate that popper,” he says rubbing the back of his neck in embarrassment.
“Next time, take off the damn hood,” you tell him, frustrated by the time wasted.
“Don’t worry. I will, if y’bring me another.” For a few seconds there is an awkward silence between you two, then Gil asks, “So what do y’want in exchange for it?”
After a few minutes you notice his ears rising up, becoming pointy again. You take out your Codex and show him new look.
Gil grabs the tip of his ear and rubs it. “This seem pointless... but, I always pay my dues. What do y’want in exchange for that?”

The dog boy’s ears fall down and become floppy again. A twitch of fury tints the corner of his face and he shouts. “Oh, c’mon! Are these things fucking with me?” He takes in a few breaths before sighing and asking, “What do y’want in exchange for that?”
